characters.name: ALI
characters.personality: Ali is a no-nonsense, by-the-book individual who prioritizes safety above all else, likely due to a strong sense of responsibility.
characters.appearance: As a seasoned flight attendant, Ali is dressed in a crisp, modern airline uniform, with a professional yet approachable demeanor.
characters.style_reference: Contemporary commercial airline aesthetic, bright colors, and clean lines, emphasizing a sense of modernity and reliability.

dialogue_samples.line: "Alright, guys, let's review the safety procedures for landing."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue_samples.line: "Everyone, please remain seated until we've come to a complete stop."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

characters.name: SAM
characters.personality: Overly cautious and slightly anxious, SAM is driven by a desire for safety and control.
characters.appearance: A middle-aged businessman in a rumpled suit, with a worn expression and a hint of stubble.
characters.style_reference: 1970s thriller, sterile and utilitarian decor, muted colors and sharp lighting.

dialogue_samples.line: "Uh, safety procedures? I didn't know we were landing yet."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, eyes scanning the instruments with confidence.

dialogue_samples.line: "But what if the plane crashes? We could all die!"
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of LEO, his words dripping with conviction as he gestures with his hands.
Wide shot of the plane, the wheels screeching to a halt on the runway.

characters.name: LEO
characters.personality: Leo appears to be a calm and reassuring individual who prioritizes stability and control, possibly as a pilot or someone in a position of authority.
characters.appearance: As a pilot, Leo is likely dressed in a crisp, functional uniform, with a clean-shaven face and short hair.
characters.style_reference: Airplane disaster film, bright and sterile cockpit aesthetic, emphasizing the feeling of confinement and reliance on technology.

dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, brow furrowed with worry, hands grasping the armrests.

dialogue_samples.line: "I'm telling you, Sam, the turbulence is just a minor setback. We'll be on the ground in no time."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEO, expression intense and focused.
Close-up of SAM, a mix of relief and exhaustion etched on his face.

characters.name: KATRINA
characters.personality: KATRINA is a warm and reassuring presence, prioritizing the safety and comfort of her passengers. She exudes a sense of confidence in her captain and the flight.
characters.appearance: KATRINA is a middle-aged woman with a friendly smile and a crisp, professional flight attendant uniform.
characters.style_reference: Modern commercial airline aesthetic, emphasizing cleanliness, efficiency, and a hint of technological sophistication.

dialogue_samples.line: "And don't forget to fasten your seatbelts, everyone. We're starting our descent."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEO, a reassuring smile spreading across his face.

dialogue_samples.line: "Hey, guys, don't worry. We're in good hands with Captain Ali. He's the best pilot around."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, his voice rising in panic, eyes darting around the cabin.

dialogue_samples.line: "Welcome to our destination, folks! Please stay seated while the plane is being cleaned and prepared for the next flight."
dialogue_samples.visual_cue: Close-up of LEO, a triumphant grin spreading across his face.
